auth.label: API Key
auth.description: Headout API key sent with the Headout-Auth header. Sign up on the official affiliate platform to receive production and testing keys by email: https://partner.headout.com/affiliate

actions.name: get_booking
actions.description: Get one booking by its Headout booking id.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for fetching one Headout booking.

anyOf.description: The partner reference identifier when present.
The minimal product reference on a Headout booking.
The customer details collected for a Headout booking.
The Headout voucher URL when available.

tickets.description: The tickets returned for this booking.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when fetching one Headout booking.

actions.name: get_product
actions.description: Get one Headout product with variants and pricing.

currencyCode.description: The ISO 4217 currency code for returned pricing.

fetchVariants.description: Whether to request variants from Headout.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for fetching one Headout product.

anyOf.description: The Headout city attached to the product.

displayTags.description: The display tags returned by Headout.

anyOf.description: The normalized Headout start location object.
The normalized Headout end location object.
Whether the product supports instant confirmation.
Whether the product supports mobile tickets.

raw.description: The raw Headout listing price object.

anyOf.description: The best discount percentage or absolute value.

raw.description: The raw Headout product pricing object.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when fetching one Headout product.

actions.name: list_bookings
actions.description: List bookings accessible to the current Headout API key.

offset.description: The pagination offset returned by a previous Headout response.

limit.description: The number of items to request from Headout.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for listing Headout bookings.

anyOf.description: The partner reference identifier when present.
The minimal product reference on a Headout booking.
The customer details collected for a Headout booking.
The Headout voucher URL when available.

tickets.description: The tickets returned for this booking.

anyOf.description: The next page URL when Headout returns one.
The previous page URL when Headout returns one.

total.description: The total number of matching Headout records.

anyOf.description: The next numeric offset when Headout returns one.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when listing Headout bookings.

actions.name: list_categories_by_city
actions.description: List Headout categories for a given city.

offset.description: The pagination offset returned by a previous Headout response.

limit.description: The number of items to request from Headout.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for listing Headout categories by city.

cityCode.description: The Headout city code for this category.

categories.description: The Headout categories in the requested city.

anyOf.description: The next page URL when Headout returns one.
The previous page URL when Headout returns one.

total.description: The total number of matching Headout records.

anyOf.description: The next numeric offset when Headout returns one.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when listing Headout categories by city.

offset.description: The pagination offset returned by a previous Headout response.

limit.description: The number of items to request from Headout.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for listing Headout cities.

name.description: The display name of the city.

anyOf.description: The next page URL when Headout returns one.
The previous page URL when Headout returns one.

total.description: The total number of matching Headout records.

anyOf.description: The next numeric offset when Headout returns one.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when listing Headout cities.

actions.name: list_inventory_by_variant
actions.description: List Headout inventory rows for one variant.

startDateTime.description: The lower bound start date-time in Headout local date-time format.

endDateTime.description: The upper bound end date-time in Headout local date-time format.

currencyCode.description: The ISO 4217 currency code for returned pricing.

offset.description: The pagination offset returned by a previous Headout response.

limit.description: The number of items to request from Headout.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for listing Headout inventory by variant.

anyOf.description: The remaining seats when Headout reports them.

inventories.description: The inventory rows returned by Headout.

anyOf.description: The next page URL when Headout returns one.
The previous page URL when Headout returns one.

total.description: The total number of matching Headout records.

anyOf.description: The next numeric offset when Headout returns one.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when listing Headout inventory.

offset.description: The pagination offset returned by a previous Headout response.

limit.description: The number of items to request from Headout.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for listing Headout products by category.

anyOf.description: A minimal Headout city object attached to a listing.
The primary category attached to the product.

raw.description: The raw Headout listing price object.

anyOf.description: The best discount percentage or absolute value.

raw.description: The raw Headout product pricing object.

anyOf.description: Whether the listing can be confirmed instantly.

raw.description: The raw Headout product listing object.

products.description: The product listings returned by Headout.

anyOf.description: The next page URL when Headout returns one.
The previous page URL when Headout returns one.

total.description: The total number of matching Headout records.

anyOf.description: The next numeric offset when Headout returns one.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when listing Headout products by category.
